title: Echoes Of Horror
description:
Horror modpack With Dwellers And More 
+ Some Quality of life Stuff
body:
**The Echoes of Horror modpack plunges you into a world of creeping dread and uncanny encounters.**
**With atmospheric lighting, unsettling structures, and eldritch surprises around every corner,** **it’s built for players who love exploring haunted caverns, abandoned keeps, and fog‑shrouded** **forests while still packing in the performance and utility mods you need to keep things running** **smoothly.**

Everything here is pre‑configured for compatibility and performance.

<details> <summary>Mods</summary>
  
- AncientCore (Ancore) by Queuete – core optimizations and utilities

- AppleSkin by squeek502 – displays food stats in your HUD

- BadMobs by Serilum – adds unpredictable twists to mob spawns

- Balm by shedaniel – universal API for Forge/Fabric compatibility

- Biomes O’ Plenty by Forstride – 80+ new biomes for eerie forests and marshes

- The Anomaly Rephased by clorobored – adds a Scary horror entity to the game

- Built‑in Servers by MinecraftDev – dev utilities (only client‑side)

- Can’t Breathe by BlindSwan – occasional suffocation events in deep caves

- Chunky by Sk1er – merges XP orbs to reduce lag in high‑mob areas

- Clumps by Jaredlll08 – combines item drops for performance

- Controlling by shedaniel – searchable keybinds and settings UI

- Dark Mode Everywhere by Darci – dark‑theme UI in all screens

- Darkness by uTeamCore – dynamic, torch‑only lighting system

- Dungeons & Taverns by TeamRabbit – handcrafted keeps, crypts and inns populated with tense encounters

- Dynamic Lights by p455w0rd – real‑time torch and glow‑stone illumination

- Essential by Tommy – shared utility library for recipe and block mods

- Evening The Fog (From‑The‑Fog) by Goblin – dense fog mechanics that roll in at dusk

- FancyMenu by shedaniel – custom main menu backgrounds to set the mood

- FallingTree by panyam – immersive log‑fall mechanics (watch your back under rotten beams…)

- FarmersDelight by vectorwing – simple cooking station and food variety to keep you sustained

- GeckoLib by Thut – animation framework for animated horrors

- GuardVillagers by Ataxexe – villagers patrol ruins with sword and shield

- Immersive First‑Person (ImfT) by Grizzly – realistic camera sway when you peak around corners

- JEI (Just Enough Items) by mezz – recipe browser for every crafting table

- Jade by Snownee – in‑world tooltip info for blocks and mobs

- Konkrete by ConcreteDev – subtle texturing to concrete blocks for gothic builds

- Lootr by Vazkii – randomized chest loot tailored to structure type

- ModelFix by MaxMade – fixes broken block and item models in custom mods

- ModernFix by EmendatusEnigma – under‑the‑hood performance improvements

- MoreDelight by vectorwing – adds hunger mechanics and seasonal crops for tension

- MouseTweaks by YaTABUCHI – intuitive inventory drag‑and‑drop

- Open Parties & Claims by ClaimsDev – secure safezones in haunted strongholds

- Spark by Modmuss50 – low‑overhead profiling for server performance

- Spartan Shields by potatoqualitee – new parries and blocking mechanics to fend off ghosts

- TerraBlender by Shadowclaimer – seamless biome transitions, perfect for misty marsh → dark forest

- The Man From The Fog by Thaumcraft‑Fan – unsettling phantom NPC that stalks you in ruins

- Travelers Backpack by tiviacz1337 – portable gear storage for long expeditions

- Vanilla‑Friendly Structures by jbrekelmans – adds modular, lore‑friendly ruin pieces

- WeirdCommands by Vaibhav – mysterious server commands to warp, summon or curse

- Xaero’s Minimap by Xaero – sleek minimap with waypoint support

- Xaero’s World Map by Xaero – full‑screen map for plotting out your next haunted locale

</details>
